translations.firstadmin.title: Create the first admin
translations.firstadmin.subtitle: Authentication is installed but has no users yet. Enter the setup code from the server console, then choose the administrator account.
translations.firstadmin.errUsername: Username must be 3-64 characters — letters, numbers, and . _ - only.
translations.firstadmin.errCode: That setup code is not valid. Check the latest code in the server console.
translations.firstadmin.errWeak: Password is too short or too common.
translations.firstadmin.errClosed: An administrator already exists — sign in instead.
